assertions.title: Quota exceeded is detected
assertions.issues: Cannot test without triggering real quota limit. Would require actual API usage to hit quota threshold.

assertions.title: Model not found error

steps.observed: Error message present but wrong status code

assertions.issues: Returns HTTP 500 instead of HTTP 400 for unknown model. Error message is correct and lists available models, but status code violates OpenAI API spec which requires 400 for invalid request errors.

blockers.description: Cannot test quota exceeded without hitting actual usage limits

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 1 passed (VAL-ERROR-001), 1 blocked (VAL-ERROR-002), 1 failed (VAL-ERROR-003 returns 500 instead of 400 for unknown model)
